dashboard.label: Ping Monitor Setup
dashboard.description: Configure the indexes and sourcetype used by the Ping Monitor dashboards, reports, and alerts.

search.query: | inputlookup ping_monitor_settings_lookup | search _key="global" | head 1 | append [| makeresults | eval index="ping", sourcetype="ping_monitor", metrics_index="ping_metrics", configured="false", last_updated="Never"] | head 1 | eval index=coalesce(index, "ping"), sourcetype=coalesce(sourcetype, "ping_monitor"), metrics_index=coalesce(metrics_index, "ping_metrics") | eval is_configured=if(configured=="true", "yes", "no")

html.p: Use this page to review the current application settings and update the event index, sourcetype, and metrics index stored in the Ping Monitor KV Store.
Review the values currently stored in KV Store. If nothing has been saved yet, the app will use the defaults shown below.

search.query: | inputlookup ping_monitor_settings_lookup | search _key="global" | head 1 | eval found=1 | append [| makeresults | eval found=0, index="ping", sourcetype="ping_monitor", metrics_index="ping_metrics", configured="false", last_updated="Never"] | sort - found | head 1 | eval status=if(configured=="true", "Configured", "Using defaults") | eval last_updated=if(isnull(last_updated) OR last_updated=="", "Never", last_updated) | table status, index, sourcetype, metrics_index, last_updated | rename status as "Status", index as "Events Index", sourcetype as "Sourcetype", metrics_index as "Metrics Index", last_updated as "Last Updated"

html.p: Enter the values used by your Ping Monitor deployment, then save the configuration. These values are used throughout the app.
Changes are written to the ping_monitor_settings_lookup KV Store collection and will be used by dashboards and saved searches on the next page load.

search.query: | makeresults | eval _key="global", index="$form_index$", sourcetype="$form_sourcetype$", metrics_index="$form_metrics_index$", configured="true", last_updated=strftime(now(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table _key, index, sourcetype, metrics_index, configured, last_updated | outputlookup ping_monitor_settings_lookup key_field=_key | eval result="Configuration saved at " . last_updated | eval details="Events Index: " . index . " | Sourcetype: " . sourcetype . " | Metrics Index: " . metrics_index | table result, details | rename result as "Status", details as "Saved Settings"

html.p: Refresh this page to confirm the updated values. Other dashboards pick up the saved settings the next time they are opened.

ol.li: Open Ping Monitor Overview to verify that events and metrics are returning data.
Open Asset Health Correlation to review the lookup-driven health views.
Enable the packaged saved searches and alerts from Splunk settings when you are ready.
